channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Trans Purple B-Stock 2624 — $989
item.description:
$989 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Trans Purple B-Stock

This unplayed C-5 GT delivers a slim, fast neck profile that sits comfortably in hand—the thin "C" shape and 35" scale make extended range playing feel natural and effortless. The set-neck construction with Ultra Access provides solid body resonance while the arched mahogany body with flamed maple top offers both visual appeal and tonal character. Minor cosmetic marks reflect B-stock pricing on an otherwise excellent instrument.

Playability & Construction

The 3-piece maple neck with carbon fiber reinforcement rods resists flex and movement, anchored by a 2-way adjustable truss rod accessible from the heel. A 35" scale paired with 24 extra-jumbo frets and a 16" fretboard radius creates a fast, articulate playing surface, while the Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut (1.771" width) and ebony fretboard ensure clarity across all five strings.

Tone & Electronics

The EMG 40DC bridge pickup and EMG 40P5 neck pickup deliver punchy, articulate bass tones with controlled dynamics. A volume control, blend potentiometer, and 2-band EMG active EQ provide sculpting options for everything from aggressive low-end definition to bright, focused mids and highs.

Key Features
  • Body: Mahogany with arched flamed maple top
  • Construction: Set-neck w/ Ultra Access; Black 1-ply binding
  • Neck: 3-piece maple with carbon fiber reinforcement rods
  • Neck Shape: Thin "C"; thickness .787" at 1st fret, .866" at 12th fret
  • Scale: 35" (889mm); 24 X-Jumbo frets; 16" radius ebony fretboard
  • Inlays: Offset/Reverse Roman Numerals with side dot markers
  • Nut: Graph Tech XL Black Tusq, 1.771" width
  • Pickups: EMG 40DC (bridge), EMG 40P5 (neck)
  • Controls: Volume/Blend/2-Band EMG active EQ
  • Bridge: Schecter Custom Bass Bridge String Thru; black hardware
  • Tuners: Schecter; 2-way truss rod with heel access
  • Strings: Ernie Ball 5 String Super Long (.045–.130)

The Satin Trans Purple finish paired with black hardware creates a modern aesthetic on a bass engineered for extended range precision and responsive dynamics.

This specific B-Stock unit features minor cosmetic imperfections: a small ding on the lower side of the body and some white marks on the finish. These marks are purely superficial and have absolutely zero impact on the playability, tone, or structural integrity of the bass. A premium Schecter instrument at a significant B-Stock discount with full manufacturer warranty.

item.title: Ibanez BTB605MS-MAM Bass Workshop Midnight Arctic Ocean Matte 5 String Bass w Case — $949.99
item.description:
$949.99 · Excellent · B Major Music

Sounds and plays so good! Straight neck. Fully functional. We cannot spot any flaws. Comes with case!


Don't miss your chance to own!


Items only come with case or accessories if pictured or listed in the listing.

Items only come with accessories/parts pictured and or listed in the listing.

Items are all setup to play each note unless otherwise listed. Items may have to be setup by user for personal preference.


INTERNATIONAL BUYERS!! If the shipping price is very high for you we recommend you using a service such as Shipito or PlanetExpress which will provide you with a USA address and forward on to your country. These are well reviewed and offer great service. Message us if you need assistance. We can usually provide estimated weight and dimensions. Non-Continental USA send us a message.   


Returns are subject to 10% restocking fee. 

Returns will be required to have the original packaging supplies and shipping box. If you destroy or dispose of the packaging or shipping box you forfeit ability to return item for defects or any other reason. If item arrives in different condition than listing buyer must contact us and await further instructions. 


We are committed to excellence in serving you, if you have any questions feel free to message.


Your item will ship within 1-3 business days of payment received. Tracking provided.

Extra shipping outside lower 48 US States.


Thank you!

item.title: 2013 Gibson LPB-3 Bass – Heritage Cherry Sunburst – Rare One-Year Model — $2,200
item.description:
$2,200 · Very Good · JJ’s Basses

2013 Gibson LPB-3 Bass – Heritage Cherry Sunburst – Rare One-Year Model

For sale is a beautiful 2013 Gibson LPB-3 Bass in Heritage Cherry Sunburst. This is the desirable version featuring the proper Gibson headstock and full-size body shape that was only produced for one year, making it a unique and increasingly hard-to-find instrument.

The bass is in excellent overall condition with only a couple of small nicks and dings from normal use—nothing major whatsoever. It has been well maintained, plays flawlessly, and sounds fantastic. The truss rod functions exactly as it should, and the neck is straight and stable.

Features:

  • Heritage Cherry Sunburst finish
  • Proper Gibson headstock
  • Full-size LPB-3 body
  • Rare one-year production model
  • Excellent playing condition
  • Fully functional truss rod
  • Well cared for and professionally maintained
  • Only minor cosmetic wear
  • Brand new Gator soft gig bag
  • 10lbs 4oz

This is a great opportunity to own a rare Gibson bass. Us sales only

item.description:

item.title: Music Man Pre Ernie Ball early 80’s - natural — $3,500
item.description:
$3,500 · Very Good · Maxwell’s Gear Depot

This bass plays great. Great neck with low action. Tons of bottom from the original era pickups.

item.title: Warwick German Corvette Standard Bubinga 4 2010s - Natural Transparent — $1,199
item.description:
$1,199 · Excellent · PLM Guitar Setup And Repair Denver,CO

This is the:

German Warwick Bubinga Corvette Standard Fretless 4 String Bass

Equipped with flat wound strings and a recent service from a Luthier.

It is in excellent condition and it’s hard to find a scratch on this bass.
The electronics are immaculate.

The fingerboard has light wear visible in photos yet it retains a consistent level creating a low action.

item.title: Cort A4 Plus FMMH Open Pore Natural — $899.99
item.description:
$899.99 · Brand New · XYZ GUITARS

A4 PLUS FMMH

Specifications

BODY MATERIAL Mahogany 

TOP MATERIAL Figured Maple 9T 

SCALE LENGTH 34″ (864mm) 

NECK MATERIAL Maple & Panga Panga 5-ply Laminated 

NECK SHAPE C Shape 

NECK THICKNESS 1F : 20.5mm, 12F : 22mm 

FINGERBOARD MATERIAL Panga Panga with Black Binding 

FINGERBOARD RADIUS 15.75″ (R400) 

NUMBER OF FRETS 24 Frets 

FRET TYPE Medium-Jumbo (2.7×1.1), Nickel Silver 

INLAY Abalone Dots with White Side Dots 

NUT MATERIAL Black PPS 

NUT WIDTH 1 1/2″ (38mm) 

TRUSS ROD Two-way Adjustable 

TUNING MACHINES Hipshot® Ultralite 

BRIDGE Hipshot® TransTone 

PICKUPS Bartolini® MK-1 

ELECTRONICS Bartolini® MK-1 

CONTROLS1-Volume, 1-Blend, 3-Band EQ, 1-Mini Toggle 

HARDWARE Platinum Silver 

STRINGS D'Addario® EXL165 (.045 .065 .085 .105) 

NECK FINISH Matte 

BODY FINISH Matte (Open Pore)

item.title: Warmoth Fretless Jazz Bass - Top Parts — $900
item.description:
$900 · Very Good · Z Gear Outlet

I am offering this Warmoth , 4 string, fretless jazz bass for sale.A real "the tone is in your hands " bass. A great sounding simple bass guitar made of quality parts.

The Warmoth neck is Pau Ferro over roasted maple finished in a few coats of tru oil. Jazz width nut, 21 "fretlines", standard rods and neck construction.

The body may be pine (purchased unkown on EBay used, with Warmoth markings).Purchase was September of 2025. Very light body.

Hipshot ultralights for the tuners and Hipshot B style brass bridge , both in black. Both very well made.

Note, there is a wear groove in the wood, near the pickup from my thumb digging in (see picture below.. a little hard to see).

I have the pickup connected with a quick connect that has screws for an easy change of pickups and easy adding of capacitors.Simple screwdriver and no soldering to use this bass. At present I have no capacitor installed and will include a few different values of capacitors for the buyer of this bass. Bass is well grounded and silent.

Pickup is a Bartolini 9J-L1 dual coil jazz bridge pickup .

From the Bartolini site:
DC Resistance: ~6.7KΩ
Resonant Frequency: ~4.9KHz

item.title: Sandberg Torsten Scholz Signature California TSBS 4 — $2,400
item.description:
$2,400 · Excellent · Eric's Gear Depot

It's like new.

Never gigged.

California TSBS.

The Torsten Scholz / Beatsteaks signature model from Sandberg. Featuring two Sandberg special design Alnico V pickups in modified mounting locations and Sandberg's Hardcore aging process.

item.title: Fender PB-57 LH Precision Bass Reissue Left-Handed MIJ — $800
item.description:
$800 · Good · David's Gear Bazaar

2012 lefty pb 57 precision bass. all factory except I installed a high mass fender bridge. Plays great, just doesn’t see use. No case included.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man BFR StingRay 5 Special HH Paua Blue 2025 - Paua Blue — $3,899
item.description:
$3,899 · Brand New · Pawn Inc.

Ernie Ball Music Man BFR StingRay 5 Special HH 5-string Bass Guitar - Paua Blue Burst

  • High-performance, boutique-grade 5-string electric bass guitar gives you full-spectrum control and unrivaled quality
  • Deeply contoured ash body with highly figured spalted maple top blends comfortable playing with attention-commanding style
  • Figured white maple bolt-on neck features a C profile for satisfying in-hand heft that accommodates players of numerous styles 
  • Figured white maple fingerboard boasts a 10-in. radius that makes full-board fretwork a breeze across all 22 stainless steel frets
  • Dual Neodymium Humbuckers support a prismatic palette of tone-crafting capabilities
  • 18-volt preamp with 3-band EQ gives you immense headroom and an immense range of sonic possibilities 
  • Vintage Music Man bridge includes vintage nickel-plated steel saddles, supporting top-loaded stringing for resounding sustain and exceptional intonation 
  • Music Man lightweight tuning machines provide superlative sonic stability without increasing the risk of pesky neck-diving tendencies
  • Quality crafted in the US

item.title: Squier Vintage Modified Jaguar Bass Special SS Candy Apple Red — $300
item.description:
$300 · Very Good · Cherry's Old Gear

I’ve had this jaguar for a few years and have barely played it, I have changed the strings once. It has some minor damage on the bottom near the guitar strap pin. You can ask for more pictures or if you have questions let me know.

item.title: Fender Artist Series Duff McKagan Deluxe Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2019 - Present - White Pearl — $1,010
item.description:
$1,010 · Very Good · Rob's Shop

Fender Duff McKagan Deluxe Precision Bass - Pearl White.

I love this bass, and hate to see it not get played. I'm primarily using 5ers these days and making room for another one that is on the way. Ships in Fender gig bag

Great condition with one ding on the top, light wear on the black pick guard (hard to capture in photos)

Upgrades:
Seymour Duncan SPB-2 P Pickup
Hipshot Kickass High Mass Bridge
Dunlop Strap-Loks

I will include the original P pickup and Bridge

Bass description:

  • Model Name : Duff McKagan Deluxe Precision Bass, Rosewood Fingerboard, White Pearl
  • Series : Artist
  • Country Of Origin : MX
  • Color : White Pearl
  • Body : Alder
  • Body Finish : Gloss Polyester
  • Body Shape : Precision Bass
  • Neck Material : Maple
  • Neck Finish : Black Painted Gloss Polyester
  • Neck Shape : Modern "C"
  • Scale Length : 34" (864 mm)
  • Fingerboard : Rosewood
  • Fingerboard Radius : 9.5" (241 mm)
  • Number of Frets : 20
  • Frets Size : Medium Jumbo
  • String Nut : Synthetic Bone
  • Nut Width : 1.625" (41.3 mm)
  • Position Inlays : Pearloid Blocks
  • Truss Rods : Standard
  • Bridge Pickup : Seymour Duncan STKJ2B Jazz Bass
  • Middle Pickup : Vintage-Style Split Single-Coil Precision Bass. -SEE UPGRADE ABOVE
  • Controls : Master Volume, Master TBX Tone Control
  • Pickup Switching : 3-Position Toggle: Position 1. Bridge Pickup, Position 2. Bridge and Middle Pickups, Position 3. Middle Pickup
  • Pickup Configuration : PJ
  • Bridge : 4-Saddle Pure Vintage '70s with Single Groove Saddles - SEE UPGRADE ABOVE
  • Hardware Finish : Black
  • Tuning Machines : Fender '70s Vintage-Style Stamped Open-Gear with Hipshot Bass Xtender "Drop D" on the E String
  • Pickguard : 3-Ply Black/White/Black
  • Control Knobs : Knurled Flat-Top Black

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 5 H with Roasted Maple Fretboard 2026 - Present - Yellow Brick Road — $2,899
item.description:
$2,899 · Brand New · Pawn Inc.

Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 5 H 5-String Electric Bass Guitar - Yellow Brick Road

  • 5-string StingRay bass delivers focused punch and extended low end
  • Ash body supports extended low-frequency response for 5-string range
  • Neodymium humbucker captures wide dynamic range and detailed attack
  • 18V 3-band active preamp provides increased output headroom
  • Roasted maple neck improves stiffness for low B string clarity
  • 34" scale length preserves familiar feel across all five strings
  • 22 stainless steel frets withstand heavy use and frequent touring
  • Melamine compensated nut improves intonation across the fingerboard
  • 5-bolt sculpted neck joint enhances strength and upper access
  • Mono output simplifies signal routing for live and recording rigs
  • MONO case included for secure protection and convenient transport

item.title: Mike Lull PJ4 2025 - Firemist Lavendar — $3,950
item.description:
$3,950 · Very Good · JD's BASSment

Stunning Mike Lull PJ4 in Firemist Lavender. This was made brand new in October of 2025. The only flaws I can find is a small chip on the headstock which is pictured. I believe this has Trickfish pickups. There is no preamp, it's a passive PJ4. Comes with Mike Lull gig bag. Initial posting on IG by Spencer . The picture with the plastic on the tuning pegs is from the initial Instagram post, the bass no longer has the plastic on the tuners.

Weight is 8 pounds 4 ounces

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 4 H with Ebony Fretboard 2024 - Present - Cherry Punch — $2,949
item.description:
$2,949 · Brand New · Pawn Inc.

Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special H 4-String Bass Guitar - Cherry Punch

  • Select body wood with sculpted contours for superior comfort
  • Neodymium humbucking pickup delivers powerful, punchy tone
  • 18V active preamp with three-band EQ for versatile sound shaping
  • Roasted maple neck for enhanced stability and smooth playability
  • 3+1 tuning key configuration for precise tuning and balance
  • Hardened steel bridge for superior sustain and resonance
  • Lightweight aluminum hardware reduces overall weight
  • Iconic oval pickguard for a signature look
  • Smooth-action truss rod wheel for easy neck adjustments
  • Includes Music Man hardshell case for protection and transport

item.title: Carvin LB60 80s - White — $699.99
item.description:
$699.99 · Fair · Ghost Guitarist

Up for grabs is my Carvin LB60 bass. It’s in a nice pearl looking white color. It definitely shifts in the light. Which is unique for this time. It’s reminds me of the new color-shift guitars. There are flaws that’ll be listed below. There are a ton of option for sound with Carvin humbucking pickup. The 3 way toggle is not normal on basses which what gained my purchase as well with the mini toggles. It currently has flat wound strings on it. There’s some other miscellaneous flaws. But nothing crazy.


- Some very minor fret wear, tons of fret life left.


- Buckle rash


- Back plate swirls


- Missing stereo jack. It was useless for my needs.


- ClearCoat cracks by knobs.


It’ll include the OHSC. Nothing Else.


Message me with any questions or concerns.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 4 H with Rosewood Fretboard 2024 - Present - Butane Blue — $2,749
item.description:
$2,749 · Brand New · Pawn Inc.

Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special H 4-String Bass Guitar - Butane Blue

  • Select body wood with sculpted contours for superior comfort
  • Neodymium humbucking pickup delivers powerful, punchy tone
  • 18V active preamp with three-band EQ for versatile sound shaping
  • Roasted maple neck for enhanced stability and smooth playability
  • 3+1 tuning key configuration for precise tuning and balance
  • Hardened steel bridge for superior sustain and resonance
  • Lightweight aluminum hardware reduces overall weight
  • Iconic oval pickguard for a signature look
  • Smooth-action truss rod wheel for easy neck adjustments
  • Includes Music Man hardshell case for protection and transport

item.title: Fender Precision Bass 1982 - Stratoburst — $3,850
item.description:
$3,850 · Excellent · Southside Guitars

This Fender Precision Bass was made in the USA in 1982. It has a very attractive red to gold finish that Fender called "stratoburst". This is a rare finish in general, and particularly rare on a standard p-bass - slightly more commonly found on the "elite" serial instruments. This bass is in very nice shape with only light play wear. It is all original. Heavy at exactly 10 pounds. It has been pro-setup in our store and is in excellent playing condition and comes with the original case.

item.title: Jackson X Series RR-B IV Limited Edition 4 String Bass - CUSTOM ART BASS — $699.99
item.description:
$699.99 · Excellent · Pirate Sam's Custom Art Guitars

This is a BRAND new overstock bass that was sent from Fender (JACKSON ) to MIRC for distribution to MIRC dealers of which I am one . It was inspected and setup before it shipped to me . It plays like new with no issues . I then took it and sanded off all the top black finish down to bare wood then added the inked graphics as shown followed by several coats of semi gloss clear to protect the art work . This is a one off NON factory finish . It is an art guitar by Pirate Sam ( Sam McCready )
I call this one " Paradise V "


Weighs in at 7  Lbs 5 oz
Year of Production: 2025

The Jackson X Series RR-B IV limited-edition electric bass guitar brings metal’s most iconic silhouette into the low-end realm with unapologetic aggression and refined playability. Built around the legendary Rhoads body shape, this four-string bass commands attention with its angular design, gloss black finish and sharp white pinstripes.

Beneath the sinister looks lies serious engineering: a poplar body with neck-thru maple construction reinforced with graphite for unparalleled sustain and stability. The amaranth fingerboard’s 12"–16" compound radius, jumbo frets and 34" scale deliver smooth, responsive performance across the neck, while Jackson’s signature pointy headstock completes the unmistakable aesthetic. Add the EMG 35DC active humbucker for uncompromising punch and clarity, and a rock-solid hardtail bridge for maximum sustain, and you’ve got a bass that blends legendary style with the brutal tone and reliability today’s heavy players demand.


Specs:

Body

  • Body style: Rhoads
  • Body wood: Poplar
  • Body finish: Gloss

Neck

  • Neck wood: Maple
  • Neck construction: Neck-thru-body with graphite reinforcement and scarf joint
  • Neck finish: Gloss
  • Scale length: 34"
  • Fingerboard wood: Amaranth
  • Fingerboard radius: 12"–16" compound
  • Number of frets: 21
  • Inlays: Pearloid sharkfin
  • Truss rod: Dual-action head-adjust

Hardware

  • Bridge: Jackson hardtail
  • Nut material: Black plastic
  • Nut width: 1.625"
  • Tuning machines: Jackson sealed die-cast
  • Hardware finish: Black

Electronics

  • Pickup configuration: H
  • Bridge pickup: EMG 35DC humbucker
  • Controls: Master volume, master tone

item.title: 1974 Fender Musicmaster Bass with Case- Daphne Blue- Extra Clean Music Master — $2,049
item.description:
$2,049 · Very Good · Alan's Gear

Here is what I would call an unusually clean Fender Musicmaster Bass from 1974. This one is finished in the desirable Daphne Blue, and it has a three-ply white pickguard. The bass appears to be 100 per cent original and its great shape for its age. The blue color is still nice and bright with plenty of gloss. You can see a little greening of the finish under the pickguard, but the visible parts of the body retain the original blue hue. There are some small finish nicks near the bottom strap button, and there is a spot below the neck plate where it looks like someone left a coily cord too long, leaving behind 4 or 5 small finish chips (see close up photos). Otherwise, I would say this one shows much less wear than the typical vintage Fender bass. The hardware is clean and everything works as it should electronically. The neck is straight with easy playing action and great frets. It comes with what I suspect is the original chipboard case. It does have a section near the bottom where the trim has come loose but I think it could be repaired (again, see the close up photo). The serial number is 548070, one control pot has a 1973 date code while the other has a 1974 code, and the pickup has what looks like a 1974 date, so this one should be firmly from 1974. (I didn't want to take the neck off so I don't know it has a neck date or code- that era is hit or miss for those I think). If you've been looking for a no questions Fender bass in a cool color don't let this one get away.

item.title: 920 d Precision wiring harness unknown — $50
item.description:
$50 · Excellent · T&M's

As new never used bourns pots.

item.title: Fender Player II Modified Active Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard and Pro Bag in Harvest Green Metallic — $808
item.description:
$808 · Excellent · Walkbaccas Space Emporium

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 4 H with Ebony Fretboard 2018 - Present - Kiwi Green — $2,849
item.description:
$2,849 · Brand New · Pawn Inc.

Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray Special Electric Bass Guitar - Kiwi Green

BRAND NEW

item.title: Player II Modified Active Jazz Bass V Maple Olympic Pearl Fender — $1,244.21
item.description:
$1,244.21 · Brand New · SonoVente

Basse électrique 5 cordes Fender Player II Modified Active Jazz Bass, touche en Érable, coloris Olympic Pearl.

item.title: Player II Modified Active Jazz Bass Maple Electric Blue Fender — $1,194.41
item.description:
$1,194.41 · Brand New · SonoVente

Basse électrique 4 cordes Fender Player II Modified Active Jazz Bass, touche en Érable, coloris Electric Blue.

item.title: 2004 Rickenbacker 4003 Bass, Jetglo, Made in USA, with case — $2,399
item.description:
$2,399 · Very Good · Coast Sonic

Maker: Rickenbacker

Model: 4003

Condition: very good 

Description: 

Here for your consideration is a 2004 Rickenbacker 4003 in very good condition! The classic 4003 with its unmistakable looks and tone that has been used by countless players on countless albums. The body shows a fair amount of wear, including finish marks, finish chips, minor dings, etc., and has some cracks in the binding on the rear, and two very small holes drilled near the bridge  (see photo). Besides that the body is overall in very good shape with no signs of any major damage. Neck shows some general finish wear, and a couple very small dings, but none affect playability and otherwise neck is comfortable and in very good condition. Headstock shows some light wear, surface marks, and dings, but overall is in good condition. Gorgeous rosewood fretboard that remains in excellent condition. Frets show some minor wear but are in great shape overall with plenty of life left. Hardware shows some general wear but is overall in good shape. Missing the thumbwheels that control the bridge mute, but has 2 Philips head screws in place that work equally as well if you want to use the mute. Electronics work great and of course features the "Rick-O-Sound" output that can operate as a regular mono output or split the neck and bridge pickup to their own dedicated outputs (as used by Chris Squire). Original pickups are in great shape and have that iconic Rickenbacker growl. Overall this one was definitely well loved and has its share of battle scars, but still remains in great shape and plays incredibly well! Has been fully inspected and set up by our tech and ready for a new home. Includes original Rickenbacker hard case. See below for a list of specs and info.

***Please contact us for an international shipping quote.***

Weight: 9lbs 7oz

Neck Profile: C

Neck Depth: 1st fret .919", 12th fret .979"

Fretboard Radius: 10"

Nut Width: 1 11/16"

Pickup Values: Neck 10.93k, Bridge 10.67k

From the web:

  • Construction: Neck-through-body design, using a solid maple body and a full-length maple neck with a structural "skunk stripe".
  • Fingerboard: Finished rosewood fingerboard with 20 frets and deluxe triangular pearloid inlays.
  • Neck Profile: Typically features a somewhat "chunky" and wide neck profile (approx. 1.69" nut width) and a flat 10-inch crown radius.
  • Electronics: Two high-output single-coil pickups wired to independent volume and tone controls, plus a 3-way selector switch.
  • Stereo Output: Features the famous dual-jack system, allowing standard mono output or "Rick-O-Sound" stereo output to route each pickup to separate amplifiers.

item.title: Moollon J Classic 2020 - Fiesta Red — $3,000
item.description:
$3,000 · Very Good · John's Gear Outlet

If you found this bass you probably already know the deal. Moollon basses are handmade in Korea to vintage Fender, pre-CBS specs. The wait list for their basses can be as long as 5 years, based on accounts I’ve read.


I played a few shows with this bass and received several compliments about its appearance and tone. However, I’m much more of a P Bass guy, so I never play this bass anymore.

In the last 3 pictures you can see the cosmetic blemishes this bass has: small chipping of the finish near the neck joint, some scuffing on the top horn from guitar straps, and chipping of the finish on the lower side of the body. All Moollon basses have thin nitrocellulose finishes that chip VERY easily. It’s part of their charm, but it also means it’s difficult to find a used Moollon without some sort of blemish. Cosmetic scuffs aside, this bass plays perfectly with a low action and no dead notes.


I have made a few modifications to this bass, but I am including all the original parts I received with the original purchase. The modifications are as follows:

-swapped pickups for Lindy Fralin single coil Jazz Bass pickups, mostly because I think his pole piece design follows the string radius better.

(original Moollon pickups included)

-swapped the controls for a Short Circuit Electronics “Blasphemy V2” wiring harness which consists of master volume, master tone, and 3 way toggle pickup selector.

(original stacked volume/tone, volume/tone plate included)

-I had the back of the neck sanded by luthier in Philadelphia (Philadelphia Fret Works) for a smoother feel. I’m not a fan of glossy necks as they can feel sticky. The back of this neck feels AMAZING now.

item.title: Hohner B2A FL - Black unlined fretless bass Steinberger System — $725
item.description:
$725 · Fair · Bees Wax

Sweet rare bass plays well passive and active electronics and Steinberger bridge.

New Rotosound light gauge strings are fun to play.

Unlined looks better I think—I just don’t like lined fretless.

There is some cosmetic damage covered with lacquer if you don’t mind. Plays perfectly. Sounds like Mick Karn, Tony Levin. Make an offer.

item.title: EBMM classic stingray5 2012 PDN GILDED WHITE — $5,200
item.description:
$5,200 · Excellent · Cappuccino’s


EBMM 2011 PDN “GILDED WHITE” (Ernie Ball Music Man Premier Dealer Network Limited Edition)

Overview and Production Background

Announced in August 2011 and shipped from late 2011 through 2012, this premium instrument represents a milestone in Ernie Ball Music Man history. It was produced in extremely limited quantities as the inaugural, full-scale global release for the Premier Dealer Network (PDN)—an exclusive program available only through select authorized flagship dealers.

Built upon the highly sought-after StingRay 5 Classic platform, this specific 5-string version is limited to just 100 units worldwide, making it an exceptionally rare and investment-grade collector piece.

Distinctive Specifications

1. Cosmetics: Gilded White Finish and Gold Hardware

The defining characteristic of this instrument is its exclusive Gilded White finish. While appearing as an elegant white pearl at first glance, it features a shimmering metallic formulation that beautifully shifts between gold and subtle violet under changing light.

・Matching Finish: The striking Gilded White gloss finish seamlessly extends from the body across the entire back of the neck and covers both the front and back of the headstock.

・Gold Hardware: Radiant gold plating is applied to the control plate, the top-loading Classic bridge assembly (complete with authentic mute pads), Schaller tuning keys, and even extends to the pickup pole pieces (Alnico magnets).

・Pickguard: Outfitted with a premium, multi-ply White Pearloid guard that perfectly complements the overall aesthetic.

2. Electronics: The First-Ever Active/Passive Switching in StingRay History

In the long history of the traditionally active-only StingRay, this specific PDN run marks a historic milestone as the first official StingRay equipped from the factory with a switchable active/passive circuit.

While preserving the classic 1-Volume and 2-Band EQ (Treble/Bass) layout, the control plate elegantly hosts four knobs to accommodate this advanced routing.

・The 4th Knob (Positioned closest to the bridge):

This control acts as a master passive tone pot equipped with a Push/Pull switch. Pulling the knob upward completely bypasses the 2-band active EQ circuit, instantly converting the bass into passive mode with the knob functioning as a traditional Passive Master Tone. Pushing the knob down returns the instrument to its legendary, high-output 2-band active voicing.

3. Core Classic Specifications

This bass faithfully retains the premium, vintage-reissue appointments inherent to the StingRay 5 Classic Series.

・Body: Premium Ash utilizing the traditional slab body design (no body contours).

・Neck and Fingerboard: Hand-selected Maple or Rosewood featuring true 5-string specs with an 11-inch radius, a comfortable 1-3/4 inch (approx. 44.5mm) nut width, and 21 high-profile frets.

・Neck Joint: Time-tested, ultra-stable 6-bolt mitered neck joint ensuring maximum sustain.

◾️ Notes from the Owner

Perfectly capturing the classic pre-Ernie Ball aesthetic and re-engineering it into a modern 5-string layout, this instrument beautifully bridges vintage heritage with the opulent ornamentation of premium EBMM production. Within this limited production run, it remains an incredibly scarce find, with a global footprint of only 100 units.

What makes this bass truly exceptional is not just its striking presence, but its unique active/passive switching architecture. While the four-knob layout might initially suggest a standard 3-band EQ setup, the knob located where the original pre-Ernie Ball output jack used to reside actually functions as the push/pull mode selector. Engaging the passive mode provides a highly musical master tone roll-off—a feature that working bassists have long desired in a StingRay, delivered here as a factory-original specification.

The original gold plating on the control plate and neck plate exhibits some honest fading and tarnish from careful use. I am currently in communication with EBMM to verify the availability of factory-genuine replacement parts. Should I be successful in procuring them, I will gladly either install them prior to shipment or include them safely in the case for the next owner.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

item.title: Cadenza upright 3/4 Model 401 2020’s - Laminated Spruce — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Excellent · Tony Sells

This bass is in excellent condition and was only used for school. This bass has Thomastik Spirocore (E, A and D) strings and has a Pirastro Perpetual G. It’s also equipped with a Realist Copper pickup.

This listing will also include:

- Rosin

- Gig bag

- Two mutes

- German bow

- Instrument stand


Because of the size of this instrument, I’m only going to do local buyers only.

item.title: Fender Player Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard 2018 - 2024 - Buttercream — $550
item.description:
$550 · Very Good · Bass Gear Outlet

This was purchased new from Sweetwater in 2023 it has been used and gigged quite frequently. It is set up with a low action with Elixir nickel strings. There is minor wear and tear on it the usual pick scratches but nothing major, looks in great condition!

No gig bag.

Weight is 9lbs.

item.title: Fender Vintera III Early '60s Bass VI Olympic White (Serial #MX26026162) — $1,400
item.description:
$1,400 · Very Good · Chicago Music Exchange

The following specs were carefully collected and recorded by a skilled technician. For a more detailed description and questions regarding sound, feel, or cosmetic condition, please call to speak to one of our experts.

Summary

Body Material: Alder

Neck Material: Maple

Fingerboard Radius: 7.25"

Nut Width: 1-11/16"

Scale Length: 30

Electronics: Original single-coil pickups, 3x on/off switches, 1x bass cut switch, master volume, and tone control

Pickup Measurements: neck: 6.18k ohms - middle: 6.39k ohms - bridge: 6.11k ohms

Cosmetic Condition: This guitar is in very good condition. A small hairline finish crack is present on the bass side of the neck pocket.

Modifications/Repairs: The D string tuner has been replaced.

Serial Number: MX26026162

Tech Notes: This Bass VI plays well with optimal neck relief and low string action. The frets are tall with no signs of play wear.

Case Details: No case/gig bag

item.title: Fender Player Mustang PJ Bass - Sonic Blue with Gig Bag - Used — $599.99
item.description:
$599.99 · Very Good · Haggerty's Music

-YOU ARE VIEWING PHOTOS OF THE ACTUAL BASS BEING SOLD!

This used 7.4 lb Fender will ship insured, fully set up, and inspected from Rapid City, SD. It is in Very Good condition with scratching on the pickguard, neck plate, and hardware along with minor scratching on the whole body.

Buy risk free with our 14 day - full refund, less shipping, return policy. Check out our shop policies for more details.

The Fender Player Mustang Bass PJ brings together classic short-scale comfort and the versatile voice that has made Fender basses a staple on stages and recordings for generations. Compact, balanced, and incredibly easy to play, it offers a feel that instantly puts you at ease whether you’re laying down grooves in the studio, rehearsing with the band, or stepping into the spotlight for a live performance. With its timeless Mustang styling and fresh colors inspired by Fender’s archives, this bass delivers vintage charm with a thoroughly modern attitude.

The combination of Vintage-Style Split Single-Coil Precision Bass and Jazz Bass pickups gives the Mustang Bass PJ an impressive range of sounds, from deep, punchy lows and growling mids to articulate highs that cut through the mix. The intuitive pickup switching makes it easy to move between classic thump, snappy attack, or a balanced blend of both, making this bass equally at home in rock, funk, country, indie, and beyond. No matter your style, the Mustang PJ responds with warmth, clarity, and the unmistakable character that players have come to expect from Fender.

Designed with comfort and performance in mind, the modern C-shaped neck and smooth rolled fingerboard edges create a playing experience that feels fast, familiar, and inviting. Its short scale adds an extra touch of effortless playability while maintaining the full, confident voice needed to anchor any band. Stylish, versatile, and endlessly fun to play. Available now at Haggerty’s Music.

Features / Specs

Highlights

  • Series: Player
  • Orientation: Right-Handed
  • Color: Swift Blue

Body

  • Body Material: Alder
  • Body Finish: Gloss
  • Body Shape: Mustang
  • Body Style: Solid

Neck

  • Headstock Type: Mustang
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Shape: C
  • Neck Finish: Satin Urethane
  • Neck Depth: 0.877" at 1st Fret, 0.952" at 12th Fret
  • Neck Construction: Bolt-On
  • Fingerboard Radius: 9.5"
  • Fingerboard Material: Pau Ferro
  • Position Inlays: White Dot
  • Side Dots: White
  • Number of Frets: 19
  • Truss Rod Style: Adjustable
  • Truss Rod Nut: Standard
  • Nut Material: Synthetic Bone
  • Nut Width: 1.5"
  • Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
  • Scale Length: 30"

Hardware

  • Bridge: 4-Saddle Standard
  • Bridge Cover/Tail Piece: None
  • Bridge Mounting: Standard
  • Pickguard: 3-Ply Mint
  • Pickup Covers: Black
  • Control Knobs: Black Plastic
  • Switch Tip: Black
  • Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome
  • Tuning Machines: Fender Vintage-Style 
  • String Trees: Disc
  • Tremolo Arm: None
  • Neck Plate: 4-Bolt
  • Strap Buttons: Two Standard
  • Output Jack: 1/4" Front

Electronics

  • Pickup Configuration: SS
  • Middle Pickup: Vintage-Style Split Single-Coil Precision Bass
  • Bridge Pickup: Vintage-Style Single-Coil Jazz Bass
  • Controls: Volume and Tone
  • Switching: 3-Way Toggle
    • Position 1. Bridge Pickup
    • Position 2. Bridge and Middle Pickups
    • Position 3. Middle Pickup
  • Auxiliary Switching: None

Miscellaneous

  • Accessories: Strings
  • Case/Gig Bag: Gig Bag (Not Original)
  • Serial Number: usedMX18126225
  • Manufacture Date: 2018

item.title: Squier Affinity Precision Bass 2000 - Baltic Blue in case — $250
item.description:
$250 · Very Good · Guitar Grave

We are selling this Squier Affinity P Bass. The guitar alone weighs 8 lb 12.8 oz, with the strap and strap lock 9 lb 0.6 oz and inside the hard shell case the total weight is 20 lb 9.7 oz

This guitar is in near mint condition with only minor scratches - no dings or dent. I am sure it was sold in 2000 because we have the original sales receipt from Daddy's Junky Music. It was owned by a guitar player / collector whose estate we have been selling.

item.title: Squier Frank Bello Signature P Jazz Bass Skull Graphic w Deluxe Gigbag & FAST Same Day Shipping — $439.99
item.description:
$439.99 · Very Good · Main Stage Music

Here is a RARE Frank Bello Signature Jazz Bass from the band Anthrax

The skull graphic will surely grab attention, and the simple dual volume controls are effortless.

We gave the guitar a fresh string change, and a shop setup and its ready to enjoy

The bass shows only mild and honest evidence of use over the past decade. Some normal scratches along the bottom edge, and some mild belt buckle. The rest of the bass polished up nice as you can see

we are including a deluxe preowned gigbag as a bonus item

We ship SAME DAY so you get your stuff FAST

Hope you snag it!

item.title: Mint Paranormal Rascal Bass HH, Laurel Fingerboard, White Pearloid Pickguard, Metallic Black — $429.99
item.description:
$429.99 · Mint · Liquid Audio

Paranormal Rascal Bass HH, Laurel Fingerboard, White Pearloid Pickguard, Metallic Black

item.title: Ibanez BTB705LMCTL 5-String Electric Bass Guitar Cosmic Blue Starburst Low Gloss — $1,299.99
item.description:
$1,299.99 · Brand New · Butler Music

The photos shown are actual photos of the bass you will receive.

Weight – 9 lbs 11.2 oz

FEATURES
  • 5pc Maple/Walnut Neck with Graphite Reinforcement Rods
  • Rosewood Fretboard
  • Medium Stainless Steel Frets
  • Flamed Maple Top / Ash / Okoume Wing Body
  • T1 Pickups
  • Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ
  • MR5S Bridge
  • EQ Bypass Switch (Passive Tone Control on Treble Pot)
  • 3-way Mid Frequency Switch
  • 35-34 inch Multi Scale
  • Neck-through Construction
DESCRIPTION

Elevate your bass playing experience with the Ibanez BTB705LM from the Bass Workshop series.

Meticulously crafted to embody the essence of boutique quality without the hefty price tag, this bass stands as a testament to Ibanez's commitment to providing inspiring and affordable instruments for musicians at any level.

The 5pc Maple/Walnut neck with Graphite reinforcement rods not only offers tonal clarity and superior attack but also ensures massive sustain and excellent stability. Complemented by a Rosewood fretboard, the bass produces a well-balanced solid tone with a focused mid-range, while Medium Stainless Steel frets contribute to durability and longevity.

The exquisite Flamed Maple top, coupled with the Ash/Okoume wing body, not only showcases a stunning wood grain but also delivers a pleasant brightness and rich sustain. The powerful T1 pickups, featuring individually mounted coils for tight bass response, punchy mid-range, and clear high-end, provide a versatile voicing suitable for various genres. The ergonomic design of the pickups, with rounded edges, enhances comfort when used as a thumb rest, ensuring a pleasurable playing experience.

Explore a wide range of tonal possibilities with the Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ, offering a refined and straightforward control system. The MR5S bridge with adjustable saddles accommodates variable string spacing, addressing the specific needs of individual bassists. Engage the EQ bypass switch for precision tonal adjustments, including passive-only operation.

The bass incorporates a 3-way Mid frequency switch, allowing players to tailor their mid-tone between 250, 450, and 700 Hz. The unique 35-34 inch multi-scale design and neck-through construction contribute to massive sustain and smooth access to high fretboard positions, empowering bassists to explore new sonic territories.

Discover the perfect balance of craftsmanship, innovation, and affordability with the Ibanez BTB705LM, a bass designed for those who seek boutique quality without compromise.

SPECIFICATIONS
  • BTB5 for Multi Scale 5pc Maple/Walnut neck-through w/ Graphite reinforcement rods
  • Zero fret
  • 889mm/35" scale at 5th string, 864mm/34" scale at 1st string
  • Flamed Maple top/Ash/Okoume wing body
  • Rosewood fretboard w/Abalone dot inlay
  • Medium Stainless Steel frets
  • T1 neck pickup
  • T1 bridge pickup
  • Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ
  • EQ bypass switch (passive tone control on treble pot)
  • 3-way Mid frequency switch
  • MR5S bridge (19mm string spacing)
  • Black hardware

item.title: Ibanez BTB1936SFL Premium 6-String Electric Bass , Sunset Fade Low Gloss w/Bag — $1,999.99
item.description:
$1,999.99 · Brand New · Butler Music

The photos shown are actual photos of the bass you will be purchasing.

Weight – 10 lbs 3.32 oz

The Ibanez BTB1936 is part of the Premium BTB line, featuring Curley Maple with Walnut stripes top & back. The African Mahogany body features a superior tonal clarity and sound. The sleek body has a curved bevel that helps create a more elegant feel.

The stainless frets are for high durability and bright tone, and it features a zero fret for accurate intonation and minimal string height. The zero fret also helps open string sounds to be the same as other frets. The MR5 bridge allows for a wide intonation adjustment range, and each isolated bridge is securely locked down to the body for maximum vibration transfer without interference.

The Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ, EQ bypass switch, and 3-way mid frequency switch allow for precise tonal control (250 Hz, 450 Hz, and 700 Hz). When the EQ bypass is activated, the treble-tone control knob works as a passive tone control for the instrument’s output. The AguilarDCB pickups provide well-developed overtones, singing sustain in the body, and note decay. The dual ceramic bar magnets equipped in the pickups provide a dynamic and responsive attack.

The combination of the EQ and the Aguilar pickups promises superior tonal possibilities for any playing situation. D’Addario NYXL strings are installed, featuring a dynamic range and harmonic response. The deep cutaway of the lower horn allows effortless access to higher frets. The 18th fret neck joint of the upper horn provides tonal sustain and neck stability.

The BTB’s 35-inch through-neck is constructed with 7 pc of Panga Panga and Purpleheart and features 2 Graphite rods inside the neck for added stability. Moreover, the neck end adjustment allows you to adjust the neck easily. The extended scale length helps create a clear sound and sufficient string tension for the lower strings while adding ringing sustain to the upper strings.

Other features include a Premium fret edge treatment, secure high-tech Neutrik locking output jack, and Gotoh machine heads. A gig bag is included.

Premium BTB1936 6-String Electric Bass Specifications:
  • BTB6 7pc Panga Panga/Purpleheart neck-through with Graphite reinforcement rods
  • 889mm/35" scale
  • Curly Maple/Walnut top/African Mahogany wing/Curly Maple back body
  • Bound Panga Panga fretboard with Abalone off-set dot inlay
  • Medium Stainless Steel frets w/Premium fret edge treatment
  • Aguilar DCB pickups
  • Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ
  • EQ bypass switch (passive tone control on treble pot)
  • 3-way Mid frequency switch
  • MR5S bridge (19mm string spacing)
  • Gold hardware
  • Gig bag included

item.title: Gibson SB-350 1972 - 1975 - Walnut — $1,500
item.description:
$1,500 · Good · SynthTown USA

Yes, it's dinged and scratched. This is definitely a player's instrument. Still works, feels, and sounds excellent. This is a bit of a different animal compared to Gibson's EB basses, as these pickups have a bit more bite and midrange. Nice chunky neck if that's your thing.

Personally I think this bass excels at two things: upright-style thump, but the bridge pickup loves overdrive and fuzz for doom/sludge. The pickups are slightly microphonic so you can coax some beautiful feedback out of it (the main reason I haven't let it go). Alas, I have too many basses and guitars.

The bridge has been upgraded/updated (old one had nylon saddles nearing their end). Also includes an Gibson case.

item.title: Ibanez EHB1505SMSFNL Headless 5-string Multi-scale Bass Guitar-Natural Low Gloss — $1,899.99
item.description:
$1,899.99 · Brand New · Butler Music

The photos shown are actual photos of the bass you will receive.
Weight – 7 pounds, 1.23 ounces
The popular original headless bass is now available in 32" to 30" scale models!
In addition to being easy to carry, which is the greatest advantage of the headless style, this bass is also easy to play.
Above all, it is the ingenuity of the "bass sound.
The Ibanez Bass Workshop has taken a fresh look at headless basses, which have often been described as "unplayable" or "difficult to use," and created a completely new headless bass, the "EHB.

The EHB is a compact, multi-scale model with 32" (5-string side) - 30" (1-string side) strings that offers both compactness and bass-like tension.
-EHB body design based on ergonomics for a perfectly balanced fit for both standing and seated players.
-Body curves for playing comfort and chambered for a more sensory feel of the body's resonance
-Body back with scooped horn back on treble strings for better access to high frets
-Poplar burl top and African mahogany body
-5pcs walnut neck w/ graphite reinforcement rods
-Panga Panga fingerboard Stainless steel frets Phosphorescent side position inlays
-Nordstrand Custom Big Split pickups
-Vari Mid 3 Band EQ w/EQ bypass switch
-MR5HS monorail bridge / newly developed headpiece designed for EHB
-Schaller S Locks strap pins / Neutrik locking jacks
-Soft case for electric guitar included

5-String Electric Bass
  • EHB-Series
  • Body: Lightweight African mahogany
  • Top: Burl poplar
  • 9-Piece bolt-on neck: Panga Panga/Walnut
  • Fingerboard: Panga Panga
  • Off-set Abalone Dot and luminescent Side Dot fingerboard inlays
  • Fingerboard radius: 508 mm (20")
  • Scale: 762 mm (30")
  • Nut width: 45 mm (1.77")
  • Plastic nut
  • 24 Medium jumbo stainless steel frets
  • Pickups: 2 Nordstrand Big Break Humbuckers (neck and bridge)
  • Vari-Mid 3-Band EQ
  • Volume, balance, bass, middle, treble and vari-mid controls
  • MR5S bridge
  • Active electronics
  • Ibanez Custom Headpiece machine heads
  • Black hardware
  • Strings: DAddario EXL170-5 .045, .065, .080, .100, .130
  • Finish: Matt Polyurethane
  • Colour: Florid Natural Low Gloss
  • Includes gig bag

item.title: Ibanez EHB1505MSPLF Multi Scale Headless 5-String Bass - Pacific Blue Burst Flat — $1,899.99
item.description:
$1,899.99 · Brand New · Butler Music

Ibanez EHB1505MSPLF Multi Scale Headless 5-String Bass - Pacific Blue Burst Flat

The photos shown are actual photos of the bass you will receive.
Weight – 6 lbs , 12.6 ounces
 

5-String Multiscale Electric Bass

The EHB1505MS features a figured Poplar Burl top on an African Mahogany body. This combination offers warm tones and rich resonance. A 9-piece Panga Panga/Walnut neck imparts strong attack with tight low-end, while the Panga Panga fretboard delivers ample sustain. Highly durable stainless steel frets accentuate tonal brightness and will not rust. The luminescent side dot inlays are easy to see in dark environments and the truss rod adjustment is located at the end of neck for easy access.The EHB's headless construction and specially designed body enable the player to maintain a similar playing position whether seated or standing. Its contoured, ergonomic design and chambered body make for a lightweight, well-balanced, and comfortable instrument that's excellent for long sets or practice session. There is extra carving on the back of the body behind the lower horn for easier upper fret access. Also, the top half of the back of the body is slanted which allows the bass to rest slight closer to the player's body for better control and a more ergonomic feel.The Nordstrand Big Split linear humbuckers supply a punchy, powerful, and well-balanced tone, with tonal characteristics between a P and J pickup. The Nordstrands are paired with a 3-band active EQ with a variable mid-frequency. There is also an EQ bypass switch for passive operation with the treble control acting as a passive tone control when the EQ is bypassed. The electronics package supplies a variety of different tones suitable for a wide range of styles.The MR5HS bridge is designed especially for the EHB basses and features wide intonation range. Each bridge piece is independently and securely attached to the body for maximum vibration transfer, and the saddles are adjustable for string spacing +/-1.5mm. Teflon washers are used on each tuner for a smooth tuning action.Schaller S-Lock strap lock pins and a Neutrik locking jack hold the strap and cable securely, and a detachable finger ramp and a gig bag are included with each instrument.

Product Features

  • Body: Poplar Burl top/Selected lightweight African Mahogany body
  • Neck: EHB5 9pc Panga Panga/Walnut neck with Graphite reinforcement rods
  • Fretboard: Bound Panga Panga fretboard with Abalone off-set dot
  • Scale Length: 889mm/35" scale at 5th string, 838mm/33" scale at 1st string
  • Frets: Medium Stainless Steel
  • Neck Pickup: Nordstrand Custom Big Split
  • Bridge Pickup: Nordstrand Custom Big Split
  • EQ: Vari-mid 3-band EQ
  • Controls: EQ bypass switch (passive tone control on treble pot)
  • Bridge: MR5HS bridge (18mm string spacing)
  • Hardware: Black
  • Strap Locks: Schaller S-Locks strap pins
  • Inlays: Luminescent side dot inlay
  • Finger Ramp: Included
  • Factory Tuning: 1G,2D,3A,4E,5B
  • String Gauge: .045/.065/.080/.100/.130
  • Gig Bag: Included

Attributes

  • Color: Pacific Blue Burst Flat
  • Active/Passive: Active
  • Finish: Matte
  • Scale Length: 35"
  • Fingerboard Material: Panga Panga
  • Top Wood: Poplar Burl
  • Neck Material: Panga Panga
  • Body Material: Mahogany
  • Body Style: Double Cut
  • Model Name: EHB1505MS
  • Body: Mahogany
  • Top: Poplar burl
  • Bolt-on 9-piece neck: Pangapanga / Walnut
  • Fretboard: Pangapanga
  • Abalone Offset Dot fretboard inlays
  • Fretboard radius: 500 mm (19.69")
  • Scale: (min.) 838 mm (32.99") - (max.) 889 mm (35")
  • Nut width: 45 mm (1.77")
  • Plastic nut
  • 24 Medium frets
  • Pickups: 2 Nordstrand Custom Big Split (bridge and neck)
  • Electronics: Varimid 3-band EQ
  • Controls: Volume, Balancer, Bass, Middle, Treble, Varimid
  • EQ bypass switch
  • MR5HS bridge
  • Ibanez custom headpieces machine heads
  • Black hardware
  • Strings: D’Addario EXL1705SL
  • Colour: Pacific Blue Burst Flat
  • Includes Schaller S-Locks and gigbag
  • Made in indonesia

item.title: Used Fender American 4-String Jazz Electric Bass Guitar Black Maple Neck with Case 2005 S-1 Switch — $1,499
item.description:
$1,499 · Very Good · Metro Gnome Music

Up for sale is a used Fender American 4-string Jazz Bass. This one was just gone through in our shop and is ready to play. It is in very good cosmetic condition, but it does have a couple minor dings and some minor scratches. It has a maple neck and a maple fretboard. It features Fender's S-1 Switch on the volume control. The bass was made in the USA, serial number Z4204257. It comes with a Fender hard case. Check out the pictures for the condition.

item.title: Fender Vintera III Late '60s Precision Bass, Maple Fingerboard, Lake Placid Blue Bass Guitar — $1,303.72
item.description:
$1,303.72 · Brand New · Central Music

The Fender® Vintera III series delivers meticulously crafted vintage recreations that capture the authentic look, feel, and tone of iconic Fender guitars from the '50s, '60s, and '70s.

The Vintera® III Late '60s Precision Bass® features an alder body and maple neck with rosewood fingerboard for classic Fender tone that's full of punch and clarity. The late '60s "C"-shape maple neck with 7.25" radius maple or rosewood fingerboard and vintage-tall frets provides supreme comfort and outstanding feel. At its heart, you'll find a vintage-style late '60s split-coil pickup that delivers all the punchy and powerful, warm and woody tone that made Fender® famous. Other features include a vintage-style 4-saddle bridge for rock-solid intonation and sustain, and vintage-style lollipop tuning machines for enhanced tuning stability.

Embrace the authentic vintage spirit and legendary sound of Vintera® III – where every detail tells the story.

Features

  • Alder Body
